title: Ginger Bug Soda Master Recipe (Make Any Flavor Soda)
description: Use this ginger bug soda master recipe to brew any flavor natural soda at home. This recipe controls sugar content to achieve the lowest possible ABV (below 1%), while still maintaining good carbonation.
steps: Ensure you have an active bubbly ginger bug culture ready before starting.
Wash your fermentation equipment thoroughly and gather all ingredients.
Measure out the required amounts of sugar and fruit using a scale.
Add the sugar, fruit, citrus juice, and water to a large pot.
Bring the mixture to a boil, then reduce heat and simmer for about 15 minutes.
Remove from heat and strain off all fruit pieces using a colander.
Carefully pour the mixture into clean glass jars, cover with cloth and rubber band, and allow to cool completely.
Once cooled, add the ginger bug to the jars and replace the cloth lid for primary fermentation.
Primary ferment for about 2 to 3 days at room temperature.
Wash your bottling equipment including bottle, strainer, and funnel.
Strain off all ginger pieces from the primary fermentation mixture.
Pour the strained mixture into pressure-safe bottles through a funnel, leaving only about 1/2 to 1 inch of headspace.
Close and secure the bottle lid, making sure the metal closure snaps shut.
Allow secondary fermentation and carbonation to proceed for about 48 hours.
If your home is warm, check the carbonation level at 24 hours; if cool, allow longer for secondary fermentation to complete.
